list.label: Instância
list.name: hostid
list.query: SELECT h.host AS __text, h.name AS __value FROM hosts h INNER JOIN host_tag ht ON h.hostid=ht.hostid AND ht.tag='camada' AND ht.value='base de dados' WHERE h.status=0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM host_tag ht2 WHERE ht2.hostid=h.hostid AND ht2.tag='ambiente' AND LOWER(ht2.value) LIKE 'produ%') ORDER BY h.host

dashboard.title: N3 · Bases de Dados · Instância — Detalhe
